title: oncidium roezlianum
intro: Oncidium roezlianum, also known as the Pink Butterfly Orchid, is a species of orchid native to Central and South America. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Oncidium roezlianum include its potential to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its ability to reduce fever and alleviate pain. The plant is typically prepared as a tincture or infusion for its herbal remedies, and can be found in some traditional medicine markets and herbal shops, particularly those specializing in Latin American medicinal plants.
